title: woof gate front-matter
description: YAML front-matter of .woof/epics/E<N>/gate.md. Validates the structured header only; the prose sections (## Context, ## Findings, ## Claude's position) are unconstrained markdown. The gate.md represents an OPEN gate; resolution is recorded as a jsonl event with a decision drawn from the taxonomy in jsonl-events.schema.json (gate_resolved.decision).

type.description: plan_gate (Stage 4, always opens). story_gate (Stage 6, conditional on Stage 5 check failure or critique blocker). review_gate (periodic; opens every-N stories or before epic close to surface accumulated minor critique findings).

stage.description: Stage that wrote the gate. plan_gate=4, story_gate=6, review_gate=5 (post-story rollup) or 6 (end-of-epic).

story_id.description: Story this gate is for. Required (non-null) when type=story_gate; null for plan_gate. For review_gate, may be null (end-of-epic) or the boundary story (every-N rollup).

triggered_by.description: Reasons the gate opened. plan_review fires automatically at Stage 4 (gate always opens). check_1..check_9 map to Stage 5 deterministic failure classes (1-8 are A-H from the failure-class taxonomy; 9 is the periodic-review valve). empty_diff_review opens when a story finishes with no diff. Driver-level: timeout, subprocess_crash (with exit_code), codex_unreachable, incomplete_subprocess. schema_validation_failed when Stage 3 self-validation exhausts the 2-attempt cap. github_sync_conflict when push detects remote-issue changes. manual for human-opened gates.

exit_code.description: Subprocess exit code. Required when triggered_by contains subprocess_crash.

harness_session_id.description: CC session UUID or Codex audit-file path of the subprocess that caused the gate.
